semantics.election: eligible Massive trades from getOptionTradePrints; live quote identity; entry profile; regular stop double confirmation
semantics.exitExecution: conservative bid from first valid full-position-size quote at or after election
semantics.openMark: conservative bid from last valid full-position-size quote at or before cutoff
semantics.openCutoffStopState: entry-profile stop derived at the cutoff mark quote midpoint, with liquidity-valid executable-bid peak and regular hard/trailing exits suppressed unless double-confirmed

canonicalization.algorithm: SHA-256 over UTF-8 bytes, lowercase hex; no trailing newline
canonicalization.deepCanonicalJavascript: const deepCanonical = value => Array.isArray(value) ? value.map(deepCanonical) : value && typeof value === 'object' ? Object.fromEntries(Object.keys(value).sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b)).map(key => [key, deepCanonical(value[key])])) : value; const bytes = JSON.stringify(deepCanonical(value));
canonicalization.rewriteTargetProjection: schemaVersion, cutoff, positions sorted by entryEventId, links sorted by entryEventId, openCutoffStopStates sorted by entryEventId, additionalCorrections sorted by entryEventId, approvedOverrides sorted by id
canonicalization.fullDocumentProjection: entire parsed document after deleting hashes.fullDocumentCanonicalSha256; includes hashes.rewriteTargetCanonicalSha256

legacyCompatibility.explanation: The historical ALL31 and OPEN20 awk filters retained one blank record, so their exact hashed bytes begin with an extra newline. EXIT11 filtered the blank record out.

dramTApprovedModeledCorrectionDelta.note: Uses the previously approved DRAM modeled fill 5.61 instead of the displayed-bid-only 5.60 alternative; T remains 0.53.
